title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are moving away from expensive CRM SaaS offerings to build proprietary AI-powered alternatives. The trend favors cost-effective Chinese AI models to reduce system costs and achieve savings.
writeup: This short covers a shift away from costly CRM SaaS subscriptions toward building proprietary AI-powered CRM systems in-house. It highlights the use of cost-effective Chinese AI models as a way to lower system costs and capture savings. The takeaway: organizations weighing CRM spend can treat model selection and custom system design as levers for cost optimization.
